settings.heading: What's Included in Your Package
settings.content: Each bottle contains a full 30-day supply (60 capsules) of our clinically dosed formula. Every ingredient and its exact dose is listed on the label — no proprietary blends, no hidden fillers.

settings.heading: Shipping
settings.content: We offer free shipping on all orders over $75. All orders are processed and shipped within 1–2 business days from our US-based facility.

settings.heading: Shipping Times
settings.content:
USA: 4–7 business days
Canada: 7–10 business days
International: 10–16 business days

You'll receive a tracking number via email once your order ships.

settings.heading: Product Details
settings.content: Manufactured in a GMP-certified, FDA-registered facility in the United States. Every batch is third-party tested for purity and potency. Contains no artificial colors, flavors, or preservatives. Non-GMO. Gluten-free.

settings.heading: 90-Day Money-Back Guarantee
settings.content:
Try it risk-free for 90 days.

If you don't feel a difference, contact us for a full refund — no questions asked, no product return required. We stand behind our formulas because the science does too.

Email: support@vitalo.io | Phone: (800) 555-0199

settings.heading: Every Ingredient at Full Clinical Doses
settings.description:
Most supplement brands use tiny, ineffective amounts of expensive ingredients just to put them on the label. Vitalo is different. Every ingredient in our formula is included at the exact dosage used in published clinical research — so you get the results the science actually supports.

No token amounts. No pixie dusting. Just honest, effective formulas designed for real results.

settings.label: Felt a noticeable difference in 30 days

settings.heading: Built Specifically for Adults 50 and Over
settings.description:
Your body at 50+ has different nutritional needs than it did at 30. Generic one-size-fits-all supplements aren't designed for you.

Vitalo formulas target the specific health concerns that matter most after 50 — from blood sugar and joint comfort to heart health, cognitive function, and deep sleep. Every formula is developed with physicians who understand aging.

settings.heading: How We Compare to Other Brands
settings.subheading: See why thousands of adults 50+ have switched to Vitalo.

settings.heading: 90-Day Money-Back Guarantee
settings.description: We stand behind the quality of every Vitalo product, which is why we offer a 90-day money-back guarantee. No questions asked. Take time to experience the difference, and if you're not completely satisfied, we'll refund your purchase. It's that simple.
settings.cta_text: Contact us at support@vitalo.io or call (800) 555-0199

settings.question: What makes Vitalo different from other supplement brands?
settings.answer: Every Vitalo product features full formula transparency (no proprietary blends), clinically studied doses, GMP-certified manufacturing in the USA, and a 90-day money-back guarantee. We believe if a supplement company hides their formula, they have something to hide.

settings.question: What does 'clinically studied doses' mean?
settings.answer: It means every ingredient in our formulas is included at the same dosage that was used in published clinical research. Many brands use tiny amounts of expensive ingredients just to put them on the label — we use the full effective dose, every time.

settings.question: Where are your products manufactured?
settings.answer: All Vitalo products are manufactured in GMP-certified, FDA-registered facilities in the United States. Every batch is third-party tested for purity and potency.

settings.question: How long does shipping take?
settings.answer: All orders are processed within 1-2 business days. Standard delivery within the USA takes 4-7 business days. You'll receive a tracking number via email as soon as your order ships.

settings.question: What is your return policy?
settings.answer: We offer a 90-day money-back guarantee on all products. If you're not satisfied for any reason, contact us for a full refund — no product return required. We trust our customers.

settings.question: How long until I see results?
settings.answer: Results vary by individual and product. Some customers notice improvements within the first 1-2 weeks, while others may take 30-60 days. Consistency is key — supplements work best when taken daily as directed. That's why we offer a full 90-day guarantee.

settings.quote: I'll be honest — I almost didn't order. I've wasted hundreds on supplements that did nothing. But the 90-day guarantee made me think, why not? Three months later, my joints feel completely different. I can garden again without dreading the next morning.
